Package org.atmosphere.lifecycle

package org.atmosphere.lifecycle
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BroadcasterLifecyclePolicyHandler
    A BroadcasterListener that enforces BroadcasterLifeCyclePolicy rules on Broadcaster creation, destruction, and resource removal events.
    LifecycleHandler
    Manages Broadcaster lifecycle policies including idle timeouts, empty broadcaster destruction, and scheduling of lifecycle-related cleanup tasks.
